summary: Add reproducible macOS Intel offline distribution and preserve its browser bridge decisions.
rationale: The distribution workflow, build script, pinned constraints, installer, tests, and supporting decisions must land together so the generated bundle remains reproducible and reviewable.
verification: uv run ruff check scripts/build_offline_macos_intel.py tests/test_build_offline_macos_intel.py tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check scripts/build_offline_macos_intel.py tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_build_offline_macos_intel.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
deletion_targets: Manual ad hoc macOS Intel packaging steps
risks: The workflow must remain manual until its forked OpenCLI inputs and offline artifacts are production-ready.
The generated bundle must be verified from the dist directory rather than trusting intermediate build files.
